name: label-309-examples
description: Runnable TypeScript examples for the Label 309 Proof-of-Existence standard, driving the published reference packages (@cardanowall/poe-standard for the wire format, @cardanowall/sdk-ts for the standalone verifier).

scripts.smoke: node src/end-to-end.ts && node src/verify-offline.ts && node src/sealed-poe.ts && node src/merkle-batch.ts && node src/validate-record.ts
